# function: custom_name

This function creates a name for a custom resource.
The format will be used based on the the resource type selected and the appropriate format string.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
custom_name(resource_type string, config dynamic, overrides dynamic...) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `resource_type` (String) Type of resource to create a name for (required for selecting format and certain variables)
1. `config` (Dynamic) Function Configuration.  Valid keys are 'name', 'type', 'location', and 'extra_tokens'.
<!-- variadic argument generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `overrides` (Variadic, Dynamic) Function Configuration Overrides.
